reasoning: The market freeze value is 0.07. After the tragic passing of Kelvin Kiptum (who ran 2:00:35), the chances of a sub-2 hour marathon before the end of 2025 dropped significantly. Eliud Kipchoge is aging and his recent performances (e.g., DNF at the Paris 2024 Olympics) suggest he is no longer at his peak. There are no other clear contenders currently running close to the 2:00 mark in legal races. While shoes and pacing technology continue to improve, beating 2:00:00 will likely require a generational talent who is currently not on the immediate horizon to peak before the end of 2025. Therefore, a very low probability is warranted.
